title: OSPF: R30 Process 10, Router-ID Loopback0, Interface-based Areas, /17 Summary (Area 50)
guidelines: Refer to the Tasks tab to view the tasks for this lab item.
Refer to the Topology tab to access the device console(s) and perform the tasks.
Console access is available for all required devices.
All necessary preconfigurations have been applied.
Do not change the enable password or hostname for any device.
Save your configurations to NVRAM before moving to the next item.
tasks: OSPF is preconfigured on all devices except R30. Configure R30 to complete these tasks.

Task 1: Configure OSPF according to the topology using these requirements: (1) Use Process ID 10. (2) Use Loopback0 for the Router ID. (3) Advertise all networks into OSPF — do NOT use network statements under the OSPF process to accomplish this task.
Task 2: Configure a /17 summary route for Area 50.
hints: R30'da 'show run int lo0' ile Loopback0 adresinin 10.0.1.30 olup olmadığını doğrula; router-id bu adres olmalı.
Network statement YASAK: OSPF'i 'ip ospf 10 area X' ile interface altında etkinleştir.
answer_key_raw:
R30:
R30> enable
R30# configure terminal
R30(config)# router ospf 10
R30(config-router)# router-id 10.0.1.30
R30(config-router)# area 50 range 10.50.0.0 255.255.128.0
R30(config-router)# exit
R30(config)# interface range loopback0,Ethernet0/0-1
R30(config-if-range)# ip ospf 10 area 0
R30(config-if-range)# interface Ethernet0/2
R30(config-if)# ip ospf 10 area 50
R30(config-if)# end
R30# write
explanation: Item 7'nin R30 varyantı: network statement yasak olduğundan OSPF interface altında 'ip ospf 10 area X' ile açılır (Lo0/e0/0/e0/1 → Area 0, e0/2 → Area 50). Router ID = Loopback0 (10.0.1.30). /17 özet (255.255.128.0) ABR R30'da 'area 50 range' ile yapılır.
